UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Karen Kwong; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Granda Enterprise Management, LLC is present. Represented by Michael Lieberman.
Attorney Patricia Henle for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jeremiah Guthrie is present.
Attorney Lynnette Baclig appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of SEP-17-2018 is vacated. (501)
